name: @platform/platform-observability
description: OpenTelemetry API wrapper for trace span creation, metrics recording, and active context access. Uses @opentelemetry/api only — SDK wiring stays in adapters-opentelemetry.

readme.summary: OpenTelemetry API wrapper for trace span creation, metrics recording, and active context access. Uses @opentelemetry/api only — SDK wiring stays in adapters-opentelemetry.
responsibilities: Wrap @opentelemetry/api for createTracer, startSpan, recordMetric, getActiveContext
Provide span helpers for BFF request spans, use-case child spans, and adapter I/O spans
Define metric recording helpers using OTel semantic conventions
Export vendor-neutral observability abstractions consumable by use-case and adapter packages
nonResponsibilities: Does not import @opentelemetry/sdk-* (SDK is wired by adapters-opentelemetry at startup)
Does not import Sentry or logging packages
operationalNotes: ADR-0020 governs this package. See docs/evidence/observability/.
